description_long: This is a sleek, modern sports car with a streamlined body painted in a vibrant blue color. The car features a low, aerodynamic profile with a pronounced black hood accent and tinted windows, enhancing its aggressive appearance. Its front end is equipped with wide, angular headlights and a large, blacked-out grille, while the rear showcases a subtle integrated spoiler and minimalistic taillights. The side profile reveals two doors, sculpted side panels, and black, multi-spoke alloy wheels that add to its sporty character. The roofline slopes gently towards the rear, emphasizing speed and performance. The overall design suggests a high-performance vehicle built for urban and highway driving.
description: A vibrant blue, low-profile sports car with black accents, tinted windows, and black multi-spoke wheels. It features a streamlined body, pronounced hood detail, and an integrated rear spoiler.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, aggressive grille, angular headlights, and prominent black hood accent.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two-door coupe design, sculpted panels, tinted windows, and black multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the integrated spoiler, minimalistic taillights, and rear window.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coupe profile, black wheels, and rear spoiler.
